summary.composition: King #001 + 20 other Special Alpacas (Guardian/Farmer/Lucky/Runner ×5). Ownership-reserved slots are #001–#010; remaining 11 Specials enter the Genesis random mint pool.

ownershipReserved.note: Reserved means ownership allocation only. All #001–#010 are Reserved Special Alpacas (NOT Commons). Gameplay abilities come only from Gameplay Class.

randomPoolSpecials.tokenIds: assigned at Genesis reveal shuffle (not reserved)

globalRules.identity: Every Special Alpaca uses the EXISTING Genesis alpaca identity and ONE existing base archetype (puff/curly/topknot/cria/sleek/scruffy/bramble/elder). Same face style, wool shape, silhouette, proportions and pixel-art rendering as the public collection.
globalRules.focus: The alpaca is the focus; the class-locked Special Background is the primary differentiator. Auras glow around the silhouette (background is layer 0, alpaca layer 1).
globalRules.palettePolicy: Only subtle, in-universe warmth/coolness shifts that echo the class aura are allowed. No neon, no hues outside the shared HANSOME palette.
globalRules.expressionPolicy: Use an existing archetype expression that suits the class mood. No new facial rigs.
globalRules.accessoryPolicy: Minimal. At most ONE subtle, OPTIONAL class accent. Not required — rarity comes from gameplay class, background, supply and metadata, NOT from accessories.

classAccents.policy: OPTIONAL subtle class accents are allowed ONLY if they do not change the base identity. Small, tasteful, single element. No large accessories. No redesigns of the alpaca.

allowed.Guardian: small guardian insignia/pin (defensive cross on a steel diamond) — NOT a second shield; the background keeps the shield emblem

constraints: must not cover the face or eyes
must not alter wool shape / silhouette / proportions
must read as an accent, never as a costume

globalRules.backgroundLock: Each token's background is LOCKED to its gameplay class (King→king, Guardian→guardian, Farmer→farmer, Lucky→lucky, Runner→runner). Enforced by scripts-nft/genesis/validate-special.mjs.
globalRules.founderExclusive: Founder #001 is the ONLY token permitted to use the iconic mascot appearance.
globalRules.status: class-map-locked-for-reserved; pool specials pending reveal tokenIds

specials.roleName: The Founder King — HANSOME, First of the Herd
specials.lore: The first alpaca of the meadow and the origin of the whole herd. Where HANSOME walks, the village follows. He wears the crown of the pasture kingdom not as a ruler over others, but as the one who remembers every alpaca's name.
specials.visualNotes: Founder-exclusive mascot base (iconic side-swept wool, signature calm smile). King background: royal purple, gold sunburst aura, crown emblem in the sky. Optional single accent: the Founder Crown. Warm gold light on the wool from the aura. Regal, serene, unmistakably the mascot — the one and only King.

specials.lore: The eldest guardian, who has watched the standing stones at the meadow's edge for longer than anyone can recall. Calm as bedrock, and just as immovable.
specials.visualNotes: Elder archetype (calm/wise). Guardian background: steel-blue temple, stone pillars, shield emblem, cool cyan aura. Steady, watchful expression. Subtle cool-grey rim light from the pillars. No accessories.

specials.lore: Slow to rise, impossible to move once planted. When storms roll over the vale, the little ones shelter behind Bramble's broad, patient wool.
specials.visualNotes: Bramble archetype (sleepy/calm, sturdy silhouette). Guardian background. Grounded, protective stance read through the existing full-body pose. Soft teal aura hugging the wool.

specials.lore: The sharp-eyed watcher who takes the coldest post at the northern fence line, trading a warm barn for a clear horizon.
specials.visualNotes: Scruffy archetype (alert/cheeky, turned into vigilant). Guardian background. Slightly cooler wool tint, attentive expression. Light motes drifting past like a cold night watch.

specials.lore: Tidy, disciplined, and endlessly reliable — the one who counts every alpaca home before the gates close at dusk.
specials.visualNotes: Topknot archetype (tidy/gentle). Guardian background. Composed, dependable expression. Cool steel palette accent; shield emblem framed above the head.

specials.lore: First awake, last to sleep. Stands the dawn watch on the ridge so the herd can rest a little longer.
specials.visualNotes: Sleek archetype (elegant/curious). Guardian background. Poised, upright read. Faint cool-to-warm gradient where the aura meets first light.

specials.lore: Happiest knee-deep in ripe wheat at golden hour. Believes a full barn and a warm nap are the two great achievements of a good life.
specials.visualNotes: Puff archetype (cozy/sleepy). Farmer background: golden-hour field, distant barn, wheat. Warm amber light on the wool, content half-closed eyes. Optional accent: a single wheat sprig (subtle).

specials.lore: Keeps the rhythm of the seasons — sowing, tending, gathering — and never rushes a single one.
specials.visualNotes: Bramble archetype. Farmer background. Earthy, calm expression; warm sun-kissed palette. No accessories required.

specials.lore: Tends the crooked apple trees behind the barn and swears the sweetest fruit grows for those who hum while they work.
specials.visualNotes: Curly archetype (sweet/gentle). Farmer background. Gentle, cheerful expression; warm golden rim light. Cozy and homely.

specials.lore: Has planted more seasons than anyone can count and still kneels to press each seed in by hoof.
specials.visualNotes: Elder archetype. Farmer background. Wise, warm expression; soft amber palette. Timeless, grounded.

specials.lore: Roams the low pastures at sundown, gathering strays with nothing but patience and a soft call.
specials.visualNotes: Scruffy archetype. Farmer background. Friendly, weathered expression; warm dusty palette. At-home-in-the-fields feel.

specials.lore: Born under a four-leaf clover, this little cria has never once tripped, never once lost a game, and never once stopped smiling.
specials.visualNotes: Cria archetype (adorable/baby). Lucky background: green meadow, gold shimmer, floating clovers. Bright, joyful expression; faint gold sparkle catch-light. Optional accent: a tiny clover (subtle).

specials.lore: Coins seem to find the ground wherever this one wanders. The herd insists it's charm; Fortune's Favorite insists it's just a good day.
specials.visualNotes: Curly archetype. Lucky background. Cheerful, lucky-go-happy expression; warm gold shimmer on the wool.

specials.lore: Carries the herd's good luck the way others carry a lantern — quietly, and for everyone.
specials.visualNotes: Puff archetype. Lucky background. Soft contented smile; gentle gold glow. Cozy and fortunate.

specials.lore: Follows every falling star and dandelion seed, collecting wishes to hand back to alpacas who've run out of their own.
specials.visualNotes: Sleek archetype (curious). Lucky background. Bright, hopeful expression; airy green-and-gold palette.

specials.lore: The one everyone wants on their team. Somehow always draws the long straw, finds the shortcut, and lands on all four hooves.
specials.visualNotes: Topknot archetype. Lucky background. Confident, sparkling-eyed expression; the strongest gold shimmer of the Lucky set.

specials.lore: Runs the ridge line every morning to wake the sun. Nobody has beaten it to the top — nobody has really tried.
specials.visualNotes: Sleek archetype (elegant/lean). Runner background: dawn sky, speed streaks, low-sun halo. Alert, forward-facing expression; cool-to-warm palette with motion streaks behind (never covering the alpaca).

specials.lore: The fastest little one in the meadow. Small enough to slip through any gap, quick enough that the gap never notices.
specials.visualNotes: Cria archetype. Runner background. Energetic, wide-awake expression; light dust motes trailing at the sides. Playful speed.

specials.lore: Finds the paths no one else will — over the creek, through the brambles, first to every new corner of the world.
specials.visualNotes: Scruffy archetype. Runner background. Bold, adventurous expression; slightly windswept read within the existing wool shape. Strong side streaks.

specials.lore: Carries news between the far barns faster than the wind carries the smell of rain. Never late, never lost.
specials.visualNotes: Curly archetype. Runner background. Focused, purposeful expression; cool energetic palette. Sense of arriving somewhere important.

specials.lore: So quick that the herd only ever sees where The Swift just was. Holds every unofficial record and remembers none of them.
specials.visualNotes: Topknot archetype. Runner background. Sharp, ready expression; the most pronounced motion streaks of the Runner set. Pure speed, still unmistakably HANSOME.
